title: CG 2004
text: Home * Conferences * Computer and Games 2004 < Prev Next > Gonda Brain Research Center [1] The Fourth International Conference on Computers and Games was held at the Gonda Brain Research Center of the Bar-Ilan University in Ramat Gan , Israel , July 5-7, 2004 , in conjunction with the 9th Computer Olympiad and the 12th World Computer Chess Championship . Contents 1 Proceedings 2 Lectures 3 Photos 4 See also 5 Reports 6 External Links 7 References Proceedings [ edit ] Jaap van den Herik , Yngvi Björnsson , Nathan S. Netanyahu (eds.) Computers and Games [2] 4th International Conference, CG 2004 Ramat Gan , Israel , July 5-7, 2004 Lecture Notes in Computer Science , Volume 3846, 2006 Springer Berlin / Heidelberg ISBN 3-540-32488-7 Lectures [ edit ] [3] Brian Sheppard ( 2004 ). Game-Tree Search with Adaptation in Stochastic Imperfect-Information Games . CG 2004 Thomas Hauk , Michael Buro , Jonathan Schaeffer ( 2004 ). Rediscovering *-Minimax Search .
